description_long: This object is a modern, slim laptop with a detachable keyboard, featuring a minimalist design and a light gray color scheme. The device has a large, high-resolution touchscreen display with thin bezels, and the screen is propped up by a built-in kickstand at the back. The keyboard is flat and compact, with chiclet-style keys and a touchpad integrated below. The laptop's exterior appears to be made of a magnesium alloy or similar metal, giving it a sleek and professional look. The Microsoft logo is visible on the back of the screen, indicating its brand. The device is shown alongside other electronics, but the laptop itself stands out for its portability and refined construction.
description: A slim, detachable laptop with a gray finish, built-in kickstand, and Microsoft logo on the back. Features a large touchscreen and compact keyboard.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the laptop's screen, keyboard, and kickstand, with the Microsoft logo visible on the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, kickstand extension, and the edge of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the screen with the Microsoft logo and the full extension of the kickstand.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the keyboard layout, touchpad, and the open screen.
attribute_brand_logo: A Microsoft logo is visible on the back of the screen, centered, consisting of a square divided into four smaller squares.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a desktop wallpaper with an animal image.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with chiclet-style keys, no numeric keypad, and a visible function row.
